name: Heringstopf Mit Saurer Sahne (Herring Salad with Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend thoroughly sour cream, yogurt, lemon juice, and sugar for the sauce.
2. Peel onions and cut into thin slices.
3. Peel and quarter apples; remove cores and cut into thin wedges.
4. Mix onions and apples with the prepared sauce.
5. Arrange herring and apple-onion mixture in layers in a dish.
6. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 5 hours.
7. Sprinkle with dill before serving.
